not_promoted: Template only; actual Cursor install-button host smoke evidence has not been produced.
Convert this template to a channel-smoke-plan with concrete host commands before running the smoke runner.

clean_environment.purpose: Prove the smoke runs from a clean Cursor profile/workspace with no prior Eve MCP state.
command_template: operator-run
Create a clean Cursor profile/workspace and confirm Eve is not already configured.

entry_url.purpose: Prove the evemem.com Cursor install button exposes install_source=install-button-cursor.
command_template: operator-run
Open ${EVE_PACK12_TARGET}/app/connect and confirm the Cursor install button/link carries install_source=install-button-cursor.

install_or_import.purpose: Install/import Eve MCP into Cursor using the install-button path.
command_template: operator-run
Use the Cursor install button or deeplink from the clean profile and confirm eve-memory is added.

connect.purpose: Connect Cursor to the hosted Eve MCP endpoint.
command_template: operator-run
Complete the Cursor MCP auth/connect flow and verify Eve MCP connectivity.

store.purpose: Store a synthetic Pack 12 smoke memory from Cursor.
command_template: operator-run
Use Cursor's connected Eve MCP tool to store ${EVE_PACK12_SMOKE_ID}.

read.purpose: Read back the synthetic smoke memory from Cursor.
command_template: operator-run
Use Cursor's Eve MCP read/search tool to retrieve ${EVE_PACK12_SMOKE_ID}.

forget.purpose: Forget the synthetic smoke memory and prove cleanup.
command_template: operator-run
Use Cursor's Eve MCP forget/delete path to remove ${EVE_PACK12_SMOKE_ID}.

install_source_flow.purpose: Prove install-button-cursor attribution reaches product analytics.
command_template: operator-run
Inspect local/server evidence and confirm install_source=install-button-cursor is preserved.
operator-run
Trigger connector.install.completed for install-button-cursor and verify audit/metric evidence.

rollback_or_uninstall.purpose: Remove Eve MCP from the clean Cursor profile.
command_template: operator-run
Run the documented Cursor removal path and verify Eve MCP config is absent.
